title: Premium Height Adjustable Table

specs.materials: 3-stage heavy-duty steel frame; Innovations thermally fused laminate top (1" thick, 3 mm PVC edgeband)
finishes_available: All HDL Innovations standard laminate colours (Evening Zen, Winter Wood, Grey Dusk, and others)
key_features: Electric synchronized dual-motor actuator (one motor per leg column)
Four programmable memory height positions with digital readout
3-stage telescoping steel column for greater stability at full extension
Fold-out leg frame for tool-free assembly
Offset foot design clears chair bases and accessories
